title: C++ error while building Verilator v4.218
body:
**Commands:**
```
autoconf
CC=clang CXX=clang++ CXXFLAGS="" LDFLAGS="" ./configure --prefix=/home/mempool/meow/mempool/install/verilator
make -j4
```
**Error message:**
```
ccache clang++  -O2 -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP  -Qunused-arguments -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-free -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/home/mempool/meow/mempool/install/verilator/share/verilator\" -c V3Const__gen.cpp -o V3Const__gen.o
../V3Const.cpp:303:22: error: no member named 'unique_ptr' in namespace 'std'
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<VarInfo>> m_varInfos;  // VarInfo for each variable, [0] is nullptr
                ~~~~~^
../V3Const.cpp:303:33: error: 'VarInfo' does not refer to a value
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<VarInfo>> m_varInfos;  // VarInfo for each variable, [0] is nullptr
                                ^
../V3Const.cpp:147:11: note: declared here
    class VarInfo final {
          ^
../V3Const.cpp:303:41: error: expected member name or ';' after declaration specifiers
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<VarInfo>> m_varInfos;  // VarInfo for each variable, [0] is nullptr
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^
../V3Const.cpp:336:23: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'
            baseIdx = m_varInfos.size();
                      ^
../V3Const.cpp:339:13: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'
            m_varInfos.resize(m_varInfos.size() + numWords);
            ^
../V3Const.cpp:339:31: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'
            m_varInfos.resize(m_varInfos.size() + numWords);
                              ^
../V3Const.cpp:343:29: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'; did you mean 'varInfop'?
        VarInfo* varInfop = m_varInfos[idx].get();
                            ^~~~~~~~~~
                            varInfop
../V3Const.cpp:343:18: note: 'varInfop' declared here
        VarInfo* varInfop = m_varInfos[idx].get();
                 ^
../V3Const.cpp:343:45: error: no member named 'get' in 'ConstBitOpTreeVisitor::VarInfo'
        VarInfo* varInfop = m_varInfos[idx].get();
                            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ ^
../V3Const.cpp:346:13: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'; did you mean 'varInfop'?
            m_varInfos[idx].reset(varInfop);
            ^~~~~~~~~~
            varInfop
../V3Const.cpp:343:18: note: 'varInfop' declared here
        VarInfo* varInfop = m_varInfos[idx].get();
                 ^
../V3Const.cpp:346:29: error: no member named 'reset' in 'ConstBitOpTreeVisitor::VarInfo'
            m_varInfos[idx].reset(varInfop);
            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ ^
../V3Const.cpp:568:9: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'
        m_varInfos.push_back(nullptr);
        ^
../V3Const.cpp:603:41: error: no member named 'm_varInfos' in 'ConstBitOpTreeVisitor'
        if (visitor.m_failed || visitor.m_varInfos.size() == 1) return nullptr;
                                ~~~~~~~ ^
../V3Const.cpp:613:32: error: no member named 'm_varInfos' in 'ConstBitOpTreeVisitor'
        termps.reserve(visitor.m_varInfos.size() - 1);
                       ~~~~~~~ ^
../V3Const.cpp:618:33: error: no member named 'm_varInfos' in 'ConstBitOpTreeVisitor'
        for (auto&& v : visitor.m_varInfos) {
                        ~~~~~~~ ^
14 errors generated.
make[3]: *** [../Makefile_obj:308: V3Const__gen.o] Error 1
make[3]: Leaving directory '/home/mempool/meow/mempool/toolchain/verilator/src/obj_opt'
make[2]: *** [Makefile:60: ../bin/verilator_bin] Error 2
make[2]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
../V3Const.cpp:303:22: error: no member named 'unique_ptr' in namespace 'std'
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<VarInfo>> m_varInfos;  // VarInfo for each variable, [0] is nullptr
                ~~~~~^
../V3Const.cpp:303:33: error: 'VarInfo' does not refer to a value
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<VarInfo>> m_varInfos;  // VarInfo for each variable, [0] is nullptr
                                ^
../V3Const.cpp:147:11: note: declared here
    class VarInfo final {
          ^
../V3Const.cpp:303:41: error: expected member name or ';' after declaration specifiers
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<VarInfo>> m_varInfos;  // VarInfo for each variable, [0] is nullptr
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^
../V3Const.cpp:336:23: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'
            baseIdx = m_varInfos.size();
                      ^
../V3Const.cpp:339:13: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'
            m_varInfos.resize(m_varInfos.size() + numWords);
            ^
../V3Const.cpp:339:31: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'
            m_varInfos.resize(m_varInfos.size() + numWords);
                              ^
../V3Const.cpp:343:29: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'; did you mean 'varInfop'?
        VarInfo* varInfop = m_varInfos[idx].get();
                            ^~~~~~~~~~
                            varInfop
../V3Const.cpp:343:18: note: 'varInfop' declared here
        VarInfo* varInfop = m_varInfos[idx].get();
                 ^
../V3Const.cpp:343:45: error: no member named 'get' in 'ConstBitOpTreeVisitor::VarInfo'
        VarInfo* varInfop = m_varInfos[idx].get();
                            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ ^
../V3Const.cpp:346:13: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'; did you mean 'varInfop'?
            m_varInfos[idx].reset(varInfop);
            ^~~~~~~~~~
            varInfop
../V3Const.cpp:343:18: note: 'varInfop' declared here
        VarInfo* varInfop = m_varInfos[idx].get();
                 ^
../V3Const.cpp:346:29: error: no member named 'reset' in 'ConstBitOpTreeVisitor::VarInfo'
            m_varInfos[idx].reset(varInfop);
            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ ^
../V3Const.cpp:568:9: error: use of undeclared identifier 'm_varInfos'
        m_varInfos.push_back(nullptr);
        ^
../V3Const.cpp:603:41: error: no member named 'm_varInfos' in 'ConstBitOpTreeVisitor'
        if (visitor.m_failed || visitor.m_varInfos.size() == 1) return nullptr;
                                ~~~~~~~ ^
../V3Const.cpp:613:32: error: no member named 'm_varInfos' in 'ConstBitOpTreeVisitor'
        termps.reserve(visitor.m_varInfos.size() - 1);
                       ~~~~~~~ ^
../V3Const.cpp:618:33: error: no member named 'm_varInfos' in 'ConstBitOpTreeVisitor'
        for (auto&& v : visitor.m_varInfos) {
                        ~~~~~~~ ^
14 errors generated.
make[3]: *** [../Makefile_obj:308: V3Const__gen.o] Error 1
make[3]: Leaving directory '/home/mempool/meow/mempool/toolchain/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make[2]: *** [Makefile:66: ../bin/verilator_bin_dbg] Error 2
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/mempool/meow/mempool/toolchain/verilator/src'
make[1]: *** [Makefile:141: verilator_exe] Error 2
```

**Environment:**
```
$ clang --version
Debian clang version 14.0.6
Target: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /usr/bin
```
- Have installed the dependencies mentioned on [the website](https://veripool.org/guide/latest/install.html#detailed-build-instructions)
- Require this specific version for the project I'm working on :smiling_face_with_tear: 

Please do tell if any other information is required, and requesting for any guidance to resolve this issue
